resultList.dtldesc: Well-Planned 2 BHK Apartment for Sale in Nizampet, HyderabadPositioned in the established residential neighbourhood of Nizampet, this ready-to-move 2 BHK apartment in PPR Happy Homes offers a practical and comfortable living environment with the advantage of excellent daily convenience. resultList.dtldesc: This expansive 3 BHK apartment in Bachupally, Hyderabad, presents a premier residential opportunity within the contemporary Urbanrise On Cloud 33 development. Situated in one of the city’s most sought-after and rapidly growing residential corridors, this residence offers a sophisticated urban living environment with a focus on elevated design and comprehensive amenities, making it an ideal choice for professionals and families seeking a high-quality home near the city's primary IT and healthcare hubs.::::Property Specifications::The residence features a well-optimised super area of 1,110 sq. ft and is positioned on the 20th floor of an impressive 33-storey tower, ensuring panoramic views and excellent cross-ventilation. This north-facing apartment is offered in an unfurnished state, providing a versatile canvas for residents to customise the interiors to their specific professional and personal tastes. The layout is thoughtfully designed to maximise space, comprising three spacious bedrooms and two modern bathrooms, complemented by two balconies that provide a refreshing and open ambience. The construction is relatively new, reflecting high architectural standards and a durable, modern finish.::::Facilities::The property is situated within a world-class gated community that provides an exhaustive range of premium facilities designed for a secure and active lifestyle. Residents benefit from a continuous 24-hour water supply, reliable power backup, and professional multi-tier security with CCTV surveillance. The development features a wide array of lifestyle amenities, including a contemporary clubhouse, a swimming pool with water slides for children, a well-equipped gymnasium, and dedicated play areas. The building is equipped with four high-speed elevators and offers dedicated covered parking for personal vehicles. Additional conveniences include an intercom facility and access to beautifully landscaped communal gardens.::::Locality::Situated strategically on the Bachupally Main Road, the property enjoys unparalleled proximity to major landmarks, including the Mamata Academy of Medical Sciences and Hospital. The neighbourhood is a premier educational hub, home to reputable institutions such as Silver Oaks International School, Kennedy High The Global School, and Delhi Public School. For commerce and transit, the residence is well-connected to the Outer Ring Road (ORR) and is approximately 8 km from the JNTU College Metro Station, ensuring a streamlined commute to Hitech City and the Financial District. Local shopping needs are served by the nearby 7 Hills Super Market and the CMR Family Mall, making this a highly practical and prestigious location for modern family living.

resultList.dtldesc: Embrace a life of modern elegance with this spacious 3 BHK apartment located in the rapidly growing residential hub of Tellapur, Hyderabad. Situated in a premium gated community, this property offers a perfect sanctuary for families seeking a blend of urban convenience and serene living. The apartment is designed with a contemporary aesthetic, featuring large windows that ensure an abundance of natural light and excellent cross-ventilation. With its strategic location near the Financial District and Hitech City, this residence provides an unparalleled opportunity for professionals looking for a high-quality home in a thriving neighbourhood.Property SpecificationsThis well-appointed apartment features a super built-up area of 1,700 sq. ft, providing ample room for a sophisticated lifestyle. The unit is located on a mid-level floor of an expertly designed tower, offering pleasant views of the landscaped gardens within the complex. The layout includes three generously sized bedrooms, three modern bathrooms with high-quality sanitary fittings, and two private balconies that serve as ideal spots for relaxation. The flooring is finished with premium vitrified tiles, and the internal walls feature a smooth putty finish with high-grade emulsion paint. Designed according to Vastu principles, the residence also includes a dedicated puja room and a spacious living-cum-dining area.FacilitiesResidents of this exclusive community have access to a wide array of world-class facilities designed for leisure and well-being. The property includes a grand clubhouse with a fully equipped gymnasium, a temperature-controlled swimming pool, and dedicated indoor games rooms. For outdoor enthusiasts, the project offers jogging tracks, a multipurpose sports court, and beautifully manicured parks. Essential services are well-catered for, featuring 24-hour power backup, a continuous water supply, and high-speed passenger lifts. Safety is a priority, with round-the-clock security personnel, intercom systems, and comprehensive CCTV surveillance ensuring a secure and professional environment for all occupants.LocalityTellapur is one of Hyderabads most sought-after residential localities, known for its excellent connectivity and planned infrastructure. The neighbourhood is situated just minutes away from the Outer Ring Road ORR, providing seamless access to Gachibowli, the Financial District, and Rajiv Gandhi International Airport. The area is home to several prestigious educational institutions, including Meru International School and Glendale Academy, as well as top-tier healthcare centres like Citizens Hospital. With a variety of supermarkets, shopping malls, and fine-dining restaurants in the immediate vicinity, Tellapur offers a self-contained and vibrant ecosystem for a modern family lifestyle.
